calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' .github/prompts/predict.md && sed -n '1,300p' AGENTS.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,220p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272491 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272491 --event evt-petition-disposition; rg --files data | rg '73272491|evt-petition-disposition' | sort; find . -path '*73272491*' -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/snapshots/2026-07-10.json data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/context.json data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; sed

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -i \"^(INTRODUCTION|STATEMENT|REASONS|ARGUMENT|CONCLUSION)|circuit|split|vehicle|preserv|waiv|forfeit|jury|Rule 32\\.2|standard of review|compelled|government|response\" data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt | sed -n '1,320p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '360,470p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '560,910p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '910,1360p' data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Second Circuit|2025 Term|2024 Term|By originating circuit|petition.*disposition|granted|denied\" metrics/statpack.md | sed -n '1,260p'; sed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -i \"modern|discretionary|era|by disposition\" metrics/statpack.md | tail -80; tail -260 metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation 'Libretti v. United States, 516 U.S. 29' --citation 'Apprendi v. New Jersey, 530 U.S. 466' --citation 'Southern Union Co. v. United States, 567 U.S. 343' --era 2020s --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"Libretti Apprendi criminal forfeiture jury",court:["ca2","ca3","ca6","ca7","ca8","ca9","ca10"],filed_after:"2000-01-01",fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],order_by:"score desc",num_results:10}); text(JSON.stringify(r));

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"tail -100 data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/petition.txt; test -f data/cases/scotus/73272491/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt; echo \"bio_present=$?\"; git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73272491","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; find data/cases/scotus/73272491 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort; git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73272491","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output)

const mk = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":1000});
const patch = "*** Begin Patch

+{
+  "case_id": "scotus/73272491",
+  "confidence": 0.74,
+  "cr

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"out=data/cases/scotus/73272491/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z; find \"$out\" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort; jq -e . \"$out\"/prediction.json \"$out\"/tooling.json \"$out\"/flags.json >/dev/null; git status --short -- \"$out\"","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output)
